reference: Three nights ago, it felt like I swallowed a tiny piece of hamburger in my lung. Later that night, I coughed a lot and vomited a lot. It calmed down after that. I am coughing a little bit, but nothing is coming up. I breathed okay last night and okay today, but I feel like my breathing is funny tonight. I have asthma and had bronchodilator treatment two weeks ago. Should I worry?
text: Three nights ago, it felt like I swallowed a tiny piece of hamburger in my lung. Later that night, I coughed a lot and vomited a lot. It calmed down after that. I am coughing a little bit, but not coming up. I breathed okay last night and okay today, but I feel like my breathing is funny tonight. I had asthma and had bronchodilator treatment two weeks ago. Should I worry?
